epigraph.text: The first to plead his case seems right, until another comes and examines him.
epigraph.quote: The null hypothesis is never proved or established, but is possibly disproved.

content.text:
Hypothesis testing provides a structured approach to using data for 
decision-making.

content.title: Hypotheses
content.content:
The **null hypothesis** $H_0$ is a statement 
of "no effect" or "no difference"â€”the skeptical position.

The **alternative hypothesis** $H_a$ 
(or $H_1$) is what we suspect may be true.

content.title: Setting Up Hypotheses
content.problem:
A manufacturer claims batteries last 500 hours. A consumer group 
suspects they last less.

$H_0: \mu = 500$ (claim is true)

$H_a: \mu < 500$ (batteries last less than claimed)

items:
Calculate the probability of observing data as extreme as 
 ours (the $p$-value)
If this probability is small, reject $H_0$

content.title: $p$-Value
content.content:
The **$p$-value** is the probability, 
assuming $H_0$ is true, of obtaining a test statistic at least as 
extreme as the one observed.

content.title: Significance Level
content.content:
The **significance level** $\alpha$ is 
the threshold for rejecting $H_0$. Common choices: $\alpha = 0.05$, 
$0.01$, $0.10$.

Reject $H_0$ if $p$-value $\leq \alpha$.

marginNotes.text:
Do not judge by appearances, but judge 
with right judgment.
